bird.name: Mindanao racket-tail
bird.summary: The Mindanao racket-tail (Prioniturus waterstradti) is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is endemic to Mindanao in the Ph…

relations.subject: Mindanao racket-tail
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Mindanao racket-tail
relations.evidence: It inhabits tropic moist montane forest at 820–2,700 m, but it has been recorded as low as 450 m
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Mindanao racket-tail
relations.evidence: It is becoming rare due to habitat loss and trapping for the pet trade
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
